mapper.select: SELECT m.menu_id AS menuId , m.parent_menu_id AS parentMenuId , m.system_main_cd AS systemMainCd , m.system_sub_cd AS systemSubCd , COALESCE(m.menu_nm ->> 'ko', '') AS menuNmKo , COALESCE(m.menu_nm ->> 'en', '') AS menuNmEn , COALESCE(m.menu_nm ->> 'ja', '') AS menuNmJa , COALESCE(m.menu_nm ->> 'vi', '') AS menuNmVi , m.menu_url AS menuUrl , m.is_active AS isActive , m.icon , m.disp_seq AS dispSeq , COALESCE(m.menu_info ->> 'menu_type', '') AS menuType , COALESCE(m.menu_info::text, '{}') AS menuInfoRaw FROM om_menu_m m WHERE m.is_deleted = false AND m.system_main_cd = #{systemMainCd} AND m.system_sub_cd = #{systemSubCd} ORDER BY m.parent_menu_id NULLS FIRST, m.disp_seq ASC, m.menu_id ASC

SELECT m.menu_id AS menuId , m.parent_menu_id AS parentMenuId , m.system_main_cd AS systemMainCd , m.system_sub_cd AS systemSubCd , COALESCE(m.menu_nm ->> 'ko', '') AS menuNmKo , COALESCE(m.menu_nm ->> 'en', '') AS menuNmEn , COALESCE(m.menu_nm ->> 'ja', '') AS menuNmJa , COALESCE(m.menu_nm ->> 'vi', '') AS menuNmVi , m.menu_url AS menuUrl , m.is_active AS isActive , m.icon , m.disp_seq AS dispSeq , COALESCE(m.menu_info ->> 'menu_type', '') AS menuType , COALESCE(m.menu_info::text, '{}') AS menuInfoRaw FROM om_menu_m m WHERE m.is_deleted = false AND m.menu_id = #{menuId}

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(m.menu_id FROM (LENGTH(#{idPrefix}) + 1)) AS INTEGER)), 0) FROM om_menu_m m WHERE m.is_deleted = false AND m.system_sub_cd = #{systemSubCd} AND m.menu_id LIKE #{idPrefix} || '%' AND LENGTH(m.menu_id) > LENGTH(#{idPrefix}) AND SUBSTRING(m.menu_id FROM (LENGTH(#{idPrefix}) + 1)) ~ '^[0-9]+$'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_menu_m ( menu_id, system_main_cd, system_sub_cd, parent_menu_id, menu_nm, menu_url, is_active, icon, disp_seq, menu_info, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{menuId}, #{systemMainCd}, #{systemSubCd}, #{parentMenuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CAST(#{menuNm} AS JSONB), #{menuUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isActive}, #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispSeq}, CAST(#{menuInfo} AS JSONB), #{userId}, #{userId}, false )
mapper.update: WITH RECURSIVE target AS ( SELECT m.menu_id FROM om_menu_m m WHERE m.menu_id = #{menuId} AND m.is_deleted = false UNION ALL SELECT c.menu_id FROM om_menu_m c JOIN target t ON c.parent_menu_id = t.menu_id WHERE c.is_deleted = false ) UPDATE om_menu_m SET is_deleted = true , updated_by = #{userId} , updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE menu_id IN (SELECT menu_id FROM target) AND is_deleted = false
